column1: # parrot0 learning sources — curated Wikipedia pages.
# The learner (scripts/learn.py) walks this list round-robin, one page per run
# (hourly on GitHub Actions), fetches the page, extracts the lead-sentence
# definition DETERMINISTICALLY (no AI), and writes a concept() fact into
# kb/learning/learned.p0. Keep this organized by domain; add/remove freely —
# this is the dial we turn to steer what parrot0 teaches itself.
